nasb.text: When they came to the nations where they went, they profaned My holy name, because it was said of them, ‘These are the people of the Lord; yet they have come out of His land.’

esv.text: But when they came to the nations, wherever they came, they profaned my holy name, in that people said of them, ‘These are the people of the Lord, and yet they had to go out of his land.’

cnv.text: 他們到了所去的列邦那裡，我的聖名就被褻瀆，因為人總是談論他們說：‘這些是耶和華的子民，他們卻要從耶和華的地出來。’

ccb.text: 他们无论分散到何处，都使我的圣名受到亵渎，因为外族人都谈论他们说，‘这些人是耶和华的子民，却不得不离开耶和华的土地。’
